description.value: Aura moderate conjuration; CL 9th; Weight 1 lb.; Slot none; Price 10,000 gp DESCRIPTION This undistinguished metal lump has no powers in its default state. By concentrating on it for 1 minute, a creature who worships a deity may transform it into a masterwork holy symbol of that deity. Whenever this holy symbol is used as a focus for channeled energy, as a free action the bearer can alter the channel area to one of the following options: 10-foot burst centered anywhere within 30 feet 60-foot line 30-foot cone The symbol reverts to its nondescript lump form after being away from its bearer for 24 hours. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, mass cure light wounds; Special creator must be able to channel energy; Cost 5,000 gp
